tools.name: rentals.search
tools.description: Return a compact, actionable shortlist of published furnished apartments by location, availability, capacity, rooms, duration, and monthly rent. Defaults to 10 available or upcoming rentals; call rentals.get for complete details.

tools.name: rentals.get
tools.description: Return localized customer-safe apartment details, verified availability, duration pricing, deposit, included services, terms, eligibility, media, and inquiry/application links.

tools.name: rentals.check_availability
tools.description: Check the current published availability state and earliest date for one rental. This does not create a hold or reservation.

tools.name: rentals.get_pricing
tools.description: Return current published monthly pricing by supported duration, parking, deposit, inclusions, payment method, and minimum-stay terms. Pricing is informational until a quote or hold is issued.

tools.name: applications.start
tools.description: Create or reuse a duplicate-safe applicant workspace for one published rental. Requires explicit current privacy consent and an idempotency key. Email verification is sent to the applicant; the tool never returns the verification URL.

tools.name: applications.get_status
tools.description: Read the privacy-minimized status and next actions for one scoped application session token.

tools.name: applications.update
tools.description: Update bounded applicant, tenancy, and billing data for one email-verified session using its exact current version and a durable idempotency key.

tools.name: applications.create_document_upload
tools.description: Create a 15-minute, exact-size and exact-content-type signed upload form for one email-verified application at its exact current version.

tools.name: applications.complete_document_upload
tools.description: Verify the uploaded object, content signature, session ownership, expiry, and exact application version before creating the protected document record.

tools.name: applications.upload_document
tools.description: Upload one bounded PDF, JPEG, or PNG identity or company-registry document to an email-verified application using its exact version and a durable idempotency key.

tools.name: applications.submit
tools.description: Submit one complete email-verified application for review using its exact version, explicit current credit-check and truth-confirmation consent, and a durable idempotency key.

tools.name: viewings.get_status
tools.description: Read customer-safe viewing proposals and confirmed viewing state for one email-verified application session.

tools.name: viewings.propose_availability
tools.description: Propose one to five bounded future viewing slots from an email-verified application at its exact version using a durable idempotency key.

tools.name: viewings.respond_to_proposal
tools.description: Accept or decline one pending Elron Club proposal with explicit confirmation, an exact application version, and a durable idempotency key. Acceptance may send the existing viewing confirmation communication.

tools.name: quotes.create
tools.description: Snapshot customer-safe approved request terms into a 24-hour quote. The application must be submitted, internally approved, due-diligence positive, and solvency passed. This does not hold inventory.

tools.name: quotes.get
tools.description: Read one privacy-minimized quote and its live expiry/availability-hold state using the application session that owns it.

tools.name: quotes.accept
tools.description: With explicit customer confirmation, accept one exact active quote and atomically claim a 30-minute request-owned availability hold. This does not create or sign a contract and does not authorize payment.

tools.name: reservations.get_status
tools.description: Read privacy-minimized hold, contract, signature, payment, reservation, or confirmation state for one application session.

tools.name: contracts.get_signing_link
tools.description: Return a secure signing URL only when the active signer invitation email matches the email-verified application session. Human verification, review, and signature remain in the signing flow.

tools.name: payments.get_status
tools.description: Return due and received payment truth for the scoped application. An approved human-action URL is returned only from an exact, unexpired provider session; no authorization URL is fabricated.

tools.name: bookings.get_confirmation
tools.description: Return a privacy-minimized booking confirmation only after the request has converted into the authoritative Stay workflow.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "applications.get_status" references sensitive artifacts (session token). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Read the privacy-minimized status and next actions for one scoped application session token.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "payments.get_status" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Return due and received payment truth for the scoped application. An approved human-action URL is returned only from an exact, unexpired provider session; no au…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: applications.submit, viewings.get_status, contracts.get_signing_link, payments.get_status · Private data: applications.get_status, applications.create_document_upload, applications.complete_document_upload, applications.upload_document · Public sink: applications.start, applications.update, applications.create_document_upload, applications.complete_document_upload, applications.upload_document, applications.submit, viewings.get_status, viewings.propose_availability, viewings.respond_to_proposal, contracts.get_signing_link.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: applications.submit, viewings.get_status, contracts.get_signing_link, payments.get_status · Private data: applications.get_status, applications.create_document_upload, applications.complete_document_upload, applications.upload_document · Public sink: applications.start, applications.update, applications.create_document_upload, applications.complete_document_upload, applications.upload_document, applications.submit, viewings.get_status, viewings.propose_availability, viewings.respond_to_proposal, contracts.get_signing_link

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
